title: chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. curvifolium
intro: Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. curvifolium, also known as variegated or yellow buttons, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. curvifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
